CA-125 Blood Test (Ovarian Cancer) 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/ca-125-blood-test-ovarian-cancer/ 
CA-125 Blood Test (Ovarian Cancer) 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a CA-125 blood test? 
This test measures the amount of a protein called CA-125 (cancer antigen 125) in a sample of your blood. CA-125 is a type of tumor marker. Tumor markers are substances that are often made by cancer Â cells or by normal cells in response to cancer.
Organs in the female reproductive system
